speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a job in your family

bullets: and explain why you find their job interesting

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about my mother. She is a nurse. She works at a hospital and takes care of patients every day. I find her job interesting because she helps many people.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Jobs and careers
questions: What job would you like to have in the future?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I am a student. My father is an engineer. In the future, I would like to be a teacher.
